summary: Comprehensive testing of Agent Configuration Manager dual-mode data sources completed. All backend API functionality working correctly, frontend UI properly reflects mode changes with expected agent counts and controls.

ui_bugs.issue: Lock icons not visible next to filesystem agents in Builder API mode
ui_bugs.details: Expected lock icons next to filesystem agent names but found 0. Functionality works but visual indicator missing.

design_issues.issue: Sidebar text shows 'Builder API' instead of 'BUILDER API'
design_issues.details: Minor text formatting difference - expected all caps but shows title case.

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and basic endpoints
Agent list retrieval (21 in MongoDB, 110 in Builder API)
Builder API CRUD operations (create, read, update, delete)
Filesystem agent protection (403 on delete attempts)
Builder API health, models, and tools endpoints
Frontend mode switching with confirmation dialog
New Agent button visibility in both modes
Agent editor with proper read-only states

success_percentage.frontend: 95% (2 minor UI issues out of major functionality)

action_item_for_main_agent: Minor UI fixes: (1) Ensure lock icons display next to filesystem agents, (2) Consider standardizing 'BUILDER API' text formatting in sidebar indicator. All core functionality working perfectly.
